3286440.name: P.A.C.K. :: Post Apocalyptic Cleaning Kit
3286440.description:
Welcome to PACK: Post Apocalyptic Cleaning Kit, the first-person adventure where tidying up is the ultimate objective! You pilot a state-of-the-art robot, initially designed for light disaster recovery—but let’s be real, the world went full 'end times.' That's fine! A good robot never misses a deadline. Get ready to power up your chassis and dive into the abandoned, dusty ruins of civilization. Use your built-in tools to wash away years of grime, vacuum up trash for compression into resource cubes, and restore old structures. Play solo and explore the funny, sad and mysterious lore behind humanity's sudden disappearance, or grab up to three friends and turn the apocalypse into a satisfying cleanup party! Get ready to scrub, scavenge, and discover—it’s time to make the apocalypse spotless!

Washing

The handy washing tool is used to wash away various types of grime, stains, or even biological residue. While the washer can move small objects, there are better tools for that job.

Vacuuming

The vacuum tool is designed to collect small items and surface debris like leaves and papers. However, the vacuum has a capacity limit. When full, you will need to eject a compressed trash cube that can then be processed at the recycling station.

Recycle

The robot's integrated graspers are used to move objects and deliver trash cubes—along with other debris too large for the vacuum—to the recycling station. These recycled items provide valuable resources that can be used to repair broken objects in the environment.

Repair

Utilize the resources acquired from recycling to repair broken equipment and objects in the environment.

Key Features

  • Clean: Deploy the high-pressure spray washer to instantly clear biological residue, stubborn grime, and environmental corruption.

  • Vacuum: Activate the tactical vacuum to sweep up debris and instantly forge compressed Trash Cubes—the ultimate loot for easy disposal and resource acquisition.

  • Recycle: Utilize the robot graspers to efficiently recover debris, collect ejected trash cubes, and transport them to the recycling station.

  • Repair: Utilize recovered resources to forge necessary components, instantly repairing critical equipment and restoring broken structures in the environment.

  • Lore: Discover echo spheres and environmental clues to piece together the narrative and uncover the full story of the collapse.

  • Co-op: Team up with up to 3 friends for streamlined co-op cleaning collaborative restoration.
